description:
You are working as an automation-workflow specialist.  
    A colleague just copied a small, tab-delimited file into  
    /home/user/data/sales_2023.tsv

    The file has five columns in the exact order shown below
    (the first line is a header row):

        1. order_id
        2. product
        3. units
        4. unit_price
        5. region

    Goal  
    ----  
    Create a *new* file called  

        /home/user/output/units_by_region.tsv  

    that meets **all** of the following requirements:

    1. It contains **only** column 3 (units) and column 5 (region)
       from /home/user/data/sales_2023.tsv.  
    2. The two kept columns must remain tab-separated  
       (i.e. a single ASCII TAB character, not spaces).  
    3. The header row must be **omitted**; the output must hold
       data rows only.  
    4. The three data lines must appear in their original order.  
    5. No extra blank lines or trailing spaces are allowed.

    Required final file layout (⟶ symbolises a TAB, do *not* type it):

        25⟶NA
        50⟶EU
        10⟶APAC

    Verification  
    -------------  
    Automated tests will check that  
        • /home/user/output/units_by_region.tsv exists,  
        • it contains **exactly** three lines,  
        • each line has exactly one TAB,  
        • the textual content matches the sample layout above *byte for byte*.

    Hint  
    ----  
    A single command line using the standard cut utility (and possibly a
    helper such as tail to skip the header) is more than enough.
truth:
<!--
    Pre-existing file with tab characters between every field.
    -->
    <existing_file path="/home/user/data/sales_2023.tsv"><![CDATA[
order_id\tproduct\tunits\tunit_price\tregion
1001\tWidget-A\t25\t9.99\tNA
1002\tWidget-B\t50\t19.99\tEU
1003\tWidget-C\t10\t4.99\tAPAC
]]></existing_file>

    <!--
    File that the agent must create.
    -->
    <expected_file path="/home/user/output/units_by_region.tsv"><![CDATA[
25\tNA
50\tEU
10\tAPAC
]]></expected_file>
name: task_000000_5664908c
